confirmation.detail: inbox envelope env_8350b180-f6a8-4cdf-84ca-80ed6f61a059 read back as received

cpy_local_residuals.detail: Operator chose to process historical matching mail for the last 90 days, but the current config/runtime does not encode or enforce a lookback window.
Operator chose no mailbox modifications except draft creation, but the draft-only posture currently includes mark_read in allowed_actions. CPY policy and config are inconsistent.

Operator chose automatic draft replies for admitted CPY mail, but config has require_human_approval: true. It is unclear whether this blocks draft creation or only blocks sending. This needs proof or clearer policy vocabulary.

CPY mailbox state currently lives under the OneDrive-backed Site .narada/state path. Staccato previously learned runtime state should live outside OneDrive-backed Site memory. CPY needs an explicit decision or correction before continuous runtime.
Preflight verified Graph credentials exist, but did not prove the Graph app can actually access andrey@kokoev.name for the CPY scope. A bounded mailbox access smoke/read proof is still needed.
Operator chose to read attachments, and config uses include_content for all admitted CPY mail. This may need size/type limits and safety/privacy posture before runtime processing.
CPY operation is activated, but runtime installation is deferred. This is locally recorded, but readiness surfaces must not imply live processing until runtime is installed and health-proven.

generic_narada_residuals.detail: fully_idle can overclaim readiness: it means no active work in admitted layers, not that client-service onboarding or capability readiness is complete.
Client onboarding is not yet cascade-driven by structured artifacts, so architects rely on memory to ask capability questions.
Mailbox setup is fragmented across bootstrap-client, want-mailbox, setup, preflight, activate, direct config edits, and manual credential binding.
want-mailbox cannot encode participant-domain admission fields, attachment include-content policy, historical windows, KB behavior, or source mailbox modification posture.
Credential reuse is not first-class; copying .env from another Site worked but is not a governed credential binding operation.
No canonical command exists for installing a client Site as a separate Windows startup runtime with health/read-back evidence.
Node path assumptions and node_modules/.bin/narada still leak into flows instead of consistently using embodiment-declared shims.
Existing adapters are not yet classified against a runtime-invariant adapter protocol.
Generated commands can mutate caller-context registries unless --cwd is explicitly set to the target Site; this nearly caused CPY identity admission into Narada proper.

requested_direction: Create CPY-local follow-up tasks or guided checklist items for historical lookback, mailbox modification policy, draft approval semantics, runtime state location, Graph access smoke, and attachment bounds.
Reflect these residuals in cascading onboarding capability questions and readiness strata.
Avoid treating activation as live runtime readiness when runtime installation is deferred.
payload.summary: After CPY client-service Site bootstrap, mailbox configuration, and activation, several residual incoherencies remain. Some are CPY-local configuration risks; others are generic Narada machinery gaps that made the onboarding fragile.
payload.title: CPY onboarding surfaced residual incoherencies after mailbox activation
